Oran
Jusu

Future funk precision meets nostalgic disco warmth — built for late nights and summer air.

Website Instagram Contact

Artist Overview

Producer &
Songwriter

Oran Jusu is a UK-based producer blending future funk, nu-disco and electronic pop — combining nostalgic textures with modern, dancefloor-ready production. His sound is defined by shimmering synths, chopped city pop samples and groove-led arrangements that feel both timeless and forward-thinking.

Based in Edinburgh, Scotland, Oran Jusu is emerging as a distinctive voice in the new wave of disco-inspired electronic music, with a growing audience across streaming platforms and viral momentum on TikTok.

Spotify Streams 175K+
Monthly Listeners 10K
TikTok Plays 2M+
Featured BBC Radio
Funding Creative Scotland
Base Edinburgh, UK

Discography

Releases

Latest Single — 2026

"Let You Down"

A bright, feel-good disco cut driven by punchy bass lines, glossy synth work and irresistibly catchy top lines. Built for warm nights and open-air moments, the track leans into a hopeful, summery energy while maintaining Oran Jusu's signature polished production style.

Upcoming

Debut
Album

Oran Jusu is currently working on his debut album — a step up in scale and ambition, expanding his sonic palette while staying rooted in groove-driven, uplifting electronic music.

The project marks a significant moment for the artist, deepening the world-building that began with early releases and the viral success of love you xo.

Supported by Creative Scotland's National Lottery funding — recognising Oran Jusu as a significant emerging voice in Scottish electronic music.
01
BBC Radio Feature Radio play recognising Oran Jusu's emerging profile in UK electronic music.
